evals.prompt: I have an iOS app using Apple's VisionKit DataScannerViewController for barcode scanning. I want to replace it with SparkScan. Here is my ViewController: VisionViewController.swift
evals.expected_output: Removes all VisionKit/Vision APIs, adds SparkScan integration with matching symbologies (ean13UPCA, code128, qr), preserves ScannedBarcode model and deduplication logic.

assertions.text: import VisionKit is NOT present in the output
import Vision is NOT present in the output
DataScannerViewController is NOT present anywhere in the output
SparkScan is initialized with .ean13UPCA, .code128, and .qr symbologies
ScannedBarcode struct is preserved in output
scannedBarcodes array is preserved in output
Deduplication logic (checking for existing value before appending) is preserved
scannerPresented flag is NOT present (Vision-specific workaround removed)
RecognizedItem pattern matching is NOT present
payloadStringValue is NOT present — barcode.data is used instead
A summary of changes is shown, with Removed and Added sections listing what was changed
Setup checklist is shown after the migration, referencing the SPM package URL (datacapture-spm)
Setup checklist mentions replacing the license key placeholder
